full_text:
Zhang Yun 張允
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Yun (張允)was born in Nanyang. Surrendered to Cao Cao with Cai Mao. Served as Cao’s Vice Admiral at Chibi. Zhang Yun was affiliated with Liu Biao and the Wei Kingdom. Zhang Yun lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
